events.title: US conducts fresh strikes on Iran
events.desc: The U.S. military is conducting fresh strikes on Iran, the U.S. Central Command announced, hours after President Donald Trump declared that an interim agreement to end the war with Iran was 'over.' The strikes are aimed at degrading Iran's ability to threaten freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: US and Iran exchange strikes after tanker attacks
events.desc: The US military stated it hit missile sites and command centers while Iran claimed it attacked US bases. This exchange follows attacks on cargo ships in the Strait of Hormuz and Trump's declaration that the interim agreement to end the war was 'over.'

events.title: Iran conducts retaliatory strikes on US infrastructure
events.desc: Iran stated it launched retaliatory attacks at US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain following US strikes on multiple targets across Iran. This escalation occurred after the US military conducted fresh strikes and President Trump declared an interim agreement to end the war 'over.'

events.title: US expands military strikes on Iran
events.desc: US forces have expanded their military strikes on Iran, following President Donald Trump's statement that he would 'hit them hard' and his declaration that the interim agreement to end the war was 'over.' The strikes aim to degrade Iran's ability to threaten freedom of navigation.

events.title: US strikes Iran after tanker attacks in Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: The US military conducted strikes on Iran after blaming Tehran for recent attacks on commercial shipping and civilian crews in the Strait of Hormuz. President Trump declared an interim agreement to end the war 'over' following the exchange.

events.title: US bombs targets in Iran, including in Iranshahr and Chabahar
events.desc: US attacks killed at least one person in the city of Iranshahr and caused widespread power outages in Chabahar, Iran. This follows retaliatory strikes from Iran on US military sites in Bahrain and Kuwait.

events.title: Iran nuclear and military damage revealed after satellite images released
events.desc: Restricted satellite imagery has revealed damage to Iranian targets, including ballistic missile infrastructure, nuclear sites, and naval bases, following recent US strikes.

events.title: Bomb blast at Damascus cafe kills nine
events.desc: A bomb blast at a cafe near the Palace of Justice in Damascus killed nine people. There was no immediate claim of responsibility for the attack.

events.title: Headteacher among four killed in Israeli attack on southern Lebanon
events.desc: An Israeli strike in southern Lebanon killed at least four people, including a headteacher, who were travelling in a car. The attack occurred a day after Lebanon and Israel signed a framework agreement.

events.title: Bomb explosions injure 18 in Damascus during Macron's visit
events.desc: Eighteen people were injured in bomb explosions in Damascus during a visit by French President Macron. State television reported that Syrian President Bashar al-Assad welcomed Macron at the presidential palace despite the attacks.

events.title: Fourteen killed in Saudi Arabia helicopter crash
events.desc: A helicopter belonging to Saudi oil giant Aramco crashed in Saudi Arabia, killing fourteen people. The cause of the crash is under investigation.

events.title: Landslide hits Rohingya school in Bangladesh, killing eight
events.desc: A landslide struck a girls' school at a refugee camp in Bangladesh, killing at least eight people, including seven children and a teacher.

events.title: Houthi attacks on maritime shipping continue
events.desc: The Houthi threat to maritime shipping in the Red Sea and Strait of Hormuz remains a significant concern. An analysis suggests the international response has been inadequate, with attention shifting between these key waterways.

events.title: Somali piracy re-emerging
events.desc: Somali piracy is re-emerging, with several recent attacks including the hijacking of three merchant vessels. The conditions that allowed for its previous suppression by multinational coalitions are no longer in place.

events.title: Hizballah predicament requires integrated approach
events.desc: Hizballah's complex nature as a militia, political party, and social services network poses unique challenges. Leaders must adopt an integrated approach to address the 'Hizballah predicament' effectively, avoiding conditions that could lead to new conflicts.
